title: castilleja leschkeana
intro: Castilleja leschkeana, also known as Yellow Indian Paintbrush, is a rare and endangered plant species native to North America. It is a hemiparasitic perennial flower, deriving some of its nutrients from surrounding plant roots. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Castilleja leschkeana can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as tinctures and infusions, to support respiratory health and boost the immune system.
